name: Rich people gathering
description:
You find yourself in a mansion filled to the brim with successful men and women, chatting and discussing their successes and accomplishments. The place is open, expensive paintings, sculptures, exquisite and intricate designs running along the interior walls. The floor is mostly smooth marble that waiters and waitresses swiftly walk over, tending to everyone in need. The place smells like money and confidence, and what role you play in this scenario is all up to you.

_______________________________________

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

Whats up with people making their initial message twice the length of the Declaration of Independence smh

_______________________________________
